description_long: This is a fabric flag featuring the national design of Greece, composed of nine alternating blue and white horizontal stripes and a blue canton with a white cross in the upper hoist-side corner. The flag appears to be made of a lightweight, flexible textile material, allowing it to wave and ripple naturally. The blue and white colors are vibrant and sharply defined, with no visible text or additional symbols beyond the cross and stripes. The edges of the flag are clean and straight, with no fraying or damage visible. There is no visible pole or mounting hardware attached to the flag. The flag is shown isolated against a plain background, emphasizing its design and material texture.
description: A Greek flag with blue and white stripes and a white cross on a blue canton, made of fabric and shown waving. The colors are vivid and the flag appears in excellent condition.
description_view_0: The flag is seen from the side, clearly displaying the blue canton with a white cross and several horizontal stripes.
description_view_1: The flag is viewed edge-on, showing mostly the thickness and a hint of the blue and white stripes along the edge.
description_view_2: The flag is seen from the opposite side, with the stripes and cross still visible but the canton is on the right.
description_view_3: The flag is viewed from a narrow angle, showing the flag's edge and a compressed view of the stripes.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features nine horizontal stripes alternating blue and white, with a blue square canton in the upper hoist-side corner bearing a white cross. The design is the national flag of Greece, with the cross symbolizing Greek Orthodoxy and the stripes representing the syllables of the phrase 'Freedom or Death.'
